name: MP7 | 装甲核心
descriptionEn: Versatile but expensive, the German-made MP7 SMG is the perfect choice for high-impact close-range combat. It has been painted with black oil-based paint and given brushed stainless steel parts and inlay. Perfect for the Operator that values sophistication as well as firepower - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 非常好用，但价格昂贵，德国制造的 MP7 微型冲锋枪非常适合高强度的近距离作战。 这把武器使用黑油性涂料进行了涂装，并附上了刷过漆的不锈钢零件和镶嵌装饰。 对于那些既重视复杂性又重视火力的特种兵来说，这绝对是完美的武器 - 军火商布兹
